heavy put selling in the chain, while calls barely move. they were just rangebounding today, even not reacting for the downstick.
no fear.
plus strenghtening the short speed profile, check real time OD chart.

comment.body: Hi Alma, thanks for your comments. I wanted to point something out that I used to watch in the old old days of Yahoo Message Boards during the 1990s dot com. If you look at the message count for this chat thread you can easily see that how the greatest number of posts lie at the lows from a few weeks ago. It's always interesting to watch how this mirrors the market. Thanks again for your work!

comment.body:
Sometimes I find it hard to think about the direction when I read the chat and that may be due to everybody have different time-frames. 
Some daytrades and look very short in time. Myself I swing trades and want more to hold for weeks at a time. And sometimes (it's my fault of course), I mis-read what others think where we are going and don't know their timeframe.

Myself, I still think we will head up to 5800+ in the near time (let say into opex or maybe one week after) and then start to slowly bleed down in a longer time. 
But what do I know
